seoTitle: Myara vs Myaree — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Myara and Myaree. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Myara and Myaree.
heading: Myara vs Myaree — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Myara, Western Australia and Myaree, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Myaree has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Myara (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Myara or Myaree safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Myara has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Myaree scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Myara scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Myaree scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Myara or Myaree?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Myaree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
